violations.text: The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety with RIDOH CFP at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. New Violation. Correct By: 09/08/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (ice machine) were observed with an accumulation of residue. Observed residue dripping directly in ice. PIC voluntarily dispose of ice and clean ice machine at time of inspection. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/08/2025

(Walk-in freezer) located in the (Kitchen) area was not in good repair. Observed walk-in freezer pipes with ice build-up, in ceiling, leaking into two buckets. PIC stated that condenser in freezer is broken. NO TCS foods located in freezer at time of inspection. Establishment has 3 external freezers. Service order is in place. New Violation. Correct By: 09/22/2025

The chlorine sanitizer concentration for the sanitizing cycle of the dishwasher was (0) parts per million (ppm). Chlorine sanitizing solutions must be between 50-100 ppm. PIC shall sanitize dishes/utensil in 3-bay sink until dishwasher is fixed. Per PIC service call will be placed. New Violation. Correct By: 09/08/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the following: -Fan covers in walk-in cooler -Stove hood vents have an accumulation of residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 09/22/2025

The following -Floors and behind equipment -drains connected to soda machines -walls next to flat top station located in the kitchen/soda storage room area has residue and other debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 09/22/2025

The coving in the (service) area is in poor repair. Observed corner of wall coving off wall. Observed missing floor titles located in popcorn/dry ingredients storage room. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 09/22/2025

At time of inspection, it was determined that the cookline does not have a hand-washing sink that is conveniently located and/or readily accessible. Hand-washing sinks must be located to allow convenient use by employees in food preparation, food dispensing, and ware-washing areas. Per interview with PIC, an additional hand sink will be installed. New Violation. Correct By: 05/14/2024

The following areas of the physical facilities were observed with an accumlation of debris: 1) The hood vents had dust 2) The ceiling tiles in the cookline and back prep area had dust 3) The column in front of prep unit had dust 4) The air vent above the dish machine area had dust Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/23/2024

Food contact surfaces of equipment (ice machine) were observed with an accumulation of biofilm. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. PIC too machine out of service to clean and sanitize and voluntarily disposed of ice. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/16/2024

The presence of rodents is not controlled as evidenced by live activity observed in hallway. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. New Violation. Correct By: 04/23/2024
The faucet and lever for the stopper/plug located at the three bay sink were observed with leaks. Equipment must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 04/30/2024

The following areas of the physical facilities were observed with an accumulation of debris: 1) The hood vents had dust 2) The ceiling vent near the prep area had dust 3) The column in front of prep unit had dust New Violation. Correct By: 04/23/2024

The ice scoop is stored on an unclean surface (top of the ice machine) between uses. During pauses in food preparation, utensils must be stored on a clean surface or in a clean, protected location. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/24/2023
Cups were observed stored on the floor in the multiple storage areas. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 05/24/2023
The flip top of the prep unit was observed in poor repair. (not properly attached). New Violation. Correct By: 06/07/2023
The facility is lacking thermo labels or similar internal temperature indicating device for the dish machine at the bar. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 06/07/2023
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the sanitizing solution for the 3-bay. New Violation. Correct By: 06/07/2023
The non-food contact surfaces of the vent cover in the walk-in has an accumulation of dust and bio-film. New Violation. Correct By: 05/24/2023
The tiles in the kitchen next to the drain was observed in poor repair allowing water to pool. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 06/07/2023

The floors in the walk-in and drains in the soda room were observed with an accumulation of food debris and bio-film. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 06/07/2023
